name: Golf Envy
about: Golf Envy is a membership-based indoor golf simulator facility focused on providing a distraction-free environment for game improvement. The venue uses GolfZon TwoVision simulators, which are described as the world's most advanced and accurate technology, offering detailed swing analysis and access to hundreds of renowned golf courses. The facility operates on an appointment-only basis, targeting golfers looking to enhance their skills through professional instruction and data-driven practice without the typical country club distractions. Membership is required for access, with opportunities to reserve simulator time, participate in exclusive events, and receive professional coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art GolfZon TwoVision simulator technology for highly accurate shot data
Climate-controlled environment allows golf to be played 24 hours a day, rain or shine
Distraction-free environment dedicated solely to golf skill enhancement
Access to hundreds of world-renowned golf courses, including Pebble Beach

food_and_drink.notes: The facility focuses solely on golf and does not offer food or beverage service to eliminate distractions.
No alcohol is served, maintaining a distraction-free environment focused on the game of golf.

simulator_hardware.notes: Described as the world's most advanced simulators with unparalleled accuracy and detailed swing analysis.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf equipment to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the facility does not allow outside food or beverages to maintain a distraction-free environment focused solely on golf.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes takes approximately one hour per round on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility does not specify age restrictions, creating a professional atmosphere accessible to all skill levels, though it is designed with an adult focus on serious practice and game improvement.
